name: ice-tools
description: iCE productivity tools — 11 skills (graphify, nanobanana-connection, higgsfield-connection, higgsfield-generate, higgsfield-product-photoshoot, higgsfield-marketplace-cards, higgsfield-soul-id, notebooklm, cua-driver, automation-workflow, claude-codex-bridge) + 1 agent (codex-bridge-agent). v1.4.1: claude-codex-bridge V01R02 adds 4 presets (anti-AI cross-check, deliverable review, code review, design debate) + fleet binding.
